nasb.text: They seize bow and spear; They are cruel and have no mercy; Their voice roars like the sea, And they ride on horses, Arrayed as a man for the battle Against you, O daughter of Zion!”

esv.text: They lay hold on bow and javelin; they are cruel and have no mercy; the sound of them is like the roaring sea; they ride on horses, set in array as a man for battle, against you, O daughter of Zion!”

cnv.text: 他們緊握弓和槍， 性情殘忍，毫無憐憫； 他們的聲音像海洋怒吼； 錫安的居民哪！ 他們騎著戰馬， 在戰場上如同一人，列陣攻擊你們。”

ccb.text: 他们残酷无情，毫无怜悯， 手持弓箭长枪， 骑马奔来，声势如狂涛怒吼。 锡安城啊，他们准备列阵攻击你。”
